mapper.select: select count(1) from practice_wrong_question_stats where paper_id = #{paperId} and deleted = false

select id, paper_id, question_id, question_title, wrong_count, wrong_rate, difficulty, sort_no, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by, deleted from practice_wrong_question_stats where paper_id = #{paperId} and deleted = false order by sort_no asc, id asc
mapper.insert:
insert into practice_wrong_question_stats ( paper_id, question_id, question_title, wrong_count, wrong_rate, difficulty, sort_no, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by, deleted ) values
(#{paperId}, #{item.questionId}, #{item.questionTitle}, #{item.wrongCount}, #{item.wrongRate}, #{item.difficulty}, #{item.sortNo}, #{item.createdAt}, #{item.updatedAt}, #{item.createdBy}, #{item.updatedBy}, #{item.deleted})
